local_results.title: Portland Farmers' Market
local_results.description: Source for local produce in a park. Seasonal locale featuring weekend vendors selling fruit, vegetables & plants grown in Maine.
local_results.user_review: "Visit often for the best seasonal, freshly picked produce!"

local_results.title: Windy Hill Farm Market LLC
local_results.user_review: "Lots of local produce, meat, cheese and handmade items."

local_results.title: William H. Jordan Farm
local_results.user_review: "Lovely staff, gorgeous produce, looks so good you want to eat it!!"

local_results.title: Parsons Farm stand
local_results.user_review: "Clean, Friendly, Great prices for Fresh Products !"

local_results.title: SPRING BROOK FARM and MARKET
local_results.user_review: "Nice selection of fresh and frozen meats."

local_results.title: Maplewood Farm
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful products, nice people, and a great presentation."

local_results.title: Frith Farm
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful fresh vegetables, flowers and farm produce."

local_results.title: Alewives Brook Farm
local_results.address: 83 Old Ocean House Rd, Cape Elizabeth, ME 04107
local_results.user_review: "The owner was wonderful, they had homemade jams, fresh produce and seafood."

local_results.title: La Plata Farmers Market
local_results.description: Friendly vendors (and trucks) offering locally grown food and handmade goods.
local_results.user_review: "The fresh produce at the big white truck their stuff tastes wonderful."

local_results.title: Public Market House
local_results.user_review: "They used to have a large facility and plenty of space."

local_results.title: Deering Oaks Park
local_results.description: Kid-friendly open space featuring ball fields, playgrounds and a splash pad.
local_results.user_review: "From the pond, to the Castle, to the benches and the farmers market."

local_results.title: Fresh Pickins Farm Stand
local_results.address: 192 Bowery Beach Rd, Cape Elizabeth, ME 04107
local_results.description: Farm selling organic flowers, honey, teas, and tinctures, as well as skin- and hair-care products.
local_results.user_review: "Fresh Pickins was in budget, beautiful, and convenient."

local_results.title: Flaherty's Family Farm, Inc.
local_results.description: Produce market featuring a selection of baked goods and flowers, plus Christmas trees and live music.
local_results.user_review: "Always a fresh and colorful selection of produce and flowers!"

local_results.title: King's Farm
local_results.user_review: "But nice fresh produce and good prices."

local_results.title: Highland Farm
local_results.description: Market featuring locally sourced produce as well as plants, trees and shrubs.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent selection of produce and friendly staff!!"

local_results.title: Winter Farmers Market
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of items from a wonderful group of vendors!"
